request.details: Refill Metformin 500 milligrams, twice daily with meals

requests.details: Refill Metformin 500 milligrams, twice daily with meals

transcript: Hey, this is James Okafor. My birthday is July 24, 1965. I need a refill on my Metformin 500 milligrams, twice daily with meals. I have Aetna HMO insurance. You can reach me at 510-555-0182.
